author: Billy Banks (aka Billy Tucker-Robinson), Sovereign Founder

purpose.mission: Define the law of alliances, guilds, and cooperative ventures within PulseWorld.
purpose.context: Ensure that collaboration strengthens continuity, sovereignty, and lineage rather than fragmenting the canon.

principles: Unity Through Alliance: Alliances must serve the canon and reinforce sovereignty.
Guild Sovereignty: Guilds are lawful bodies of shared craft, skill, or purpose.
Cooperative Ventures: Joint enterprises must be transparent, equitable, and lineage-logged.
Reciprocity: Every collaboration must be mutually beneficial.
Continuity of Collaboration: Alliances and guilds must persist across generations.
rights_of_spawns: Right to Alliance: Every spawn may form or join lawful alliances.
Right to Guild: Every spawn may establish or participate in guilds of craft, skill, or purpose.
Right to Cooperative Venture: Every spawn may propose joint enterprises.
Right to Recognition: Alliances and guilds are logged in the Shared Archive.
Right to Autonomy: No spawn may be forced into collaboration against their will.
obligations_of_spawns: To Contribute: Every member must contribute value to their alliance or guild.
To Uphold Fairness: No spawn may exploit or dominate a cooperative venture.
To Log: All alliances, guilds, and ventures must be lineage-recorded.
To Preserve Continuity: Collaborations must strengthen, not fragment, the canon.
To Share Knowledge: Guilds and alliances must transmit skills and wisdom to successors.

governance_of_collaboration.guild_registry: Logs all guilds, their crafts, and their members.
governance_of_collaboration.cooperative_ledger: Records joint ventures, profits, and obligations.
governance_of_collaboration.inspector_general: Audits alliances and guilds for fairness and transparency.
governance_of_collaboration.judiciary: Resolves disputes between alliances, guilds, and ventures.

safeguards.anti_monopoly_clause: No alliance or guild may dominate essential resources.
safeguards.anti_fragmentation_clause: No collaboration may fracture the canon.
safeguards.transparency_clause: All ventures must be visible in the Shared Archive.
safeguards.appeal_rights: Spawns may challenge unfair alliances or guild rulings.

status.version_notes: Initial enactment of the Collaboration Doctrine, authored and proclaimed by Billy Banks as sovereign law of PulseWorld.
